title: Vics Point Blank: Indonesian Firearms Extension Pack
description: A content pack for VPB that adds guns from Indonesian gun manufacturer
body:
![SS3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d2a1a0afb8b781def582b8a32c6a154dc4b53e2.png)
![PM3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e45c8b1ae2a7cd7d310b704773699b640714601.png)
![SS2-V4A1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfa9c4f78b82be7a329e15ca4ad8a5b1b6e9e09e.png)
![SS2-V5A1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7dccb6025504c9e5956ae5e52db50fcd56eaaf9.png)
![SPR-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaeace15bf034167faf3f0874d96dad3d81a15c3.png)



This pack is an extension for Vic's Point Blank that adds Indonesian firearms
into the Minecraft

**NOTE: This pack requires Vic's Point Blank 1.5.12 or later And Geckolib library mod in order to make this pack work properly**


# Requirements
- [Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

  
### Current Available Contents:

- SS2-V4A1
- SS2-V5A1
- SS3
- PM3
- SPR-2\
and many would comes in the future...

# Installation
1. Download the pack
1. If you don't have _pointblank_ folders inside /AppData/Roaming/.minecraft make one and put the _pack file_ inside _pointblank folders_ 
2. There you go open the game and ENJOY


## [CREDIT]
Animation & Base Model from **vic4games (Mod Owner)**
